name: eslint-plugin-disable-autofix
description: Disable autofix for ESLint rules without turning them off

scripts.major: npm version major; cd dist && npm version major
scripts.minor: npm version minor; cd dist && npm version minor
scripts.patch: npm version patch; cd dist && npm version patch
scripts.test: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9
scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:v8: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v8 --runInBand
scripts.test:v9: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9 --runInBand
scripts.test:perf: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/performance.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:edge: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/edge-cases.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/integration.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:validation: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/validation-exhaustive.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:scopes: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/plugin-scopes.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:syntax: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/config-syntax.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:rules: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/rule-types.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:real-world: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/real-world-plugins.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:cross-platform: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ts tests/v9/cross-platform.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm i ./dist && jest --config=jest.config.ci.ts --coverage --testResultsProcessor=./tests/results-processor.js --runInBand
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && npm i ./dist && node -e "require('./dist/index.js'); console.log('✅ Plugin loads successfully')"
scripts.ci:validate: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:ci && npm run validate-config eslint.config.js 2>/dev/null || echo 'No config to validate'
scripts.ci:comprehensive: npm run test:all && npm run test:integration && npm run test:validation && npm run test:real-world && npm run test:perf && npm run test:edge

author: Mikl Wolfe <wolfe@mikl.io> (https://github.com/chiefmikey)
